query:
INSERT INTO liquidity_events
                (pool_address, protocol, signature,
                 token_a_mint, token_b_mint,
                 liquidity_event_kind, amount_a, amount_b, timestamp)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
            ON CONFLICT (signature, timestamp) DO NOTHING
